product.name: ArWoWear T6 Soft
descriptions: ArWoWear T6 Soft is light weight 200 g/m², %60 Cotton %40 Polyester merserized workwear fabric with ultra comfort.
It is the economical version of ArWoWear T6 series.
technicalParameters: Tensile Strength | Warp>800N; Weft>600N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp>20N; Weft>15N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Perspiration Light Fast. | 2-3 | EN ISO 105 B07
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1
Water and Oil Repellent | 4 | EN ISO 4920

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Application listed as 'Coveralls' which is generic workwear, not explicitly military/uniformed service use.

modelOutput.noMatchReason: Product is a generic economical cotton/polyester twill workwear fabric intended for coveralls (vests, pants), with OEKO-TEX certification and water/oil repellency. No explicit sector application (military, firefighting, energy, welding, motorcycle, hivis, medical, sport, architecture-building, transport) is stated in the supplied data.
